description: Multi-strategy capital allocator - sizes the seven strategy desks by tail-aware inverse-vol risk parity (archetype skew prior shrunk toward firm-stress worst-case losses) plus a macro regime tilt, rolls up firm net beta + diversification ratio.

eventbridge_scheduler.description: Desk Allocator - daily 00:30 UTC via Amazon EventBridge Scheduler, after all seven strategy desks have refreshed their books. Scheduler is the go-forward path; the classic 300-rule EventBridge pool is saturated.
